name: Basil-Mint-Orange Pesto
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, blend the first five ingredients until almost smooth.
2. With the machine running, gradually add 1/4 cup olive oil; process until smooth.
3. If the pesto is dry, mix in more oil by spoonfuls.
4. Season with salt and pepper.
5. (Can be made ahead. Cover surface of pesto with plastic wrap before refrigerating up to 2 days or freezing for up to 1 week. Bring to room temperature before using.) Makes about 3/4 cup.
